/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libbwi_tasks_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libbwi_tasks_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/bwi_tasks_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/bwi_tasks_interface/msg/virtual_obstacle__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/nikunj/bwi_ros2_simulation/build/bwi_tasks_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libbwi_tasks_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
